verdicts.verdict_greek: οὐθὲν γὰρ ἀγαπᾷ ὁ θεὸς εἰ μὴ τὸν σοφίᾳ συνοικοῦντα.
verdicts.reasoning: The scan clearly reads οὐθὲν γὰρ ἀγαπᾷ ὁ θεὸς εἰ μὴ τὸν σοφίᾳ συνοικοῦντα, and this is corroborated by Rahlfs and the expected diplomatic Vaticanus tradition reflected in Cambridge LXX.

notes: Adjudicated from Swete p. 617 (scan page 634); verse numbering is Wisdom 7:28 at the end of chapter VII on the page.
